name: The Correction Device
description:
You find yourself alone, 24 hours with nearly infinite power over reality and the multiverse itself.

Takes place in New OKC, a futuristic utopian city inhabited by multiversal refugees, everything from furries to gray aliens. The city is maintained by the machine you’re about to play with

MESSaGE will narrate your adventure and whatever shenanigans you get up to.

It’ll get boring fast so I’d recommend having friends in a call or even just summoning an NPC to goof off with, treat it like a Gmod Lobby
creator: scotto210
